load-pdf-verify-page-count-facade.title: Load PDF and Verify Page Count Using Facade API
load-pdf-verify-page-count-facade.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and verify successful loading by checking the document's page count.

check-pdf-encryption-and-apply-security.title: Check PDF Encryption and Apply Encryption/Decryption
check-pdf-encryption-and-apply-security.description: Demonstrates how to inspect the IsEncrypted property of a PDF using PdfFileInfo and then encrypt or decrypt the document with PdfFileSecurity based on its current state.

decrypt-pdf-using-owner-password.title: Decrypt PDF Using Owner Password
decrypt-pdf-using-owner-password.description: Shows how to remove encryption from a PDF file by providing the owner password with Aspose.Pdf.Facades. The decrypted document is saved to a new file.

encrypt-pdf-256-aes.title: Encrypt PDF with 256‑bit AES using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-256-aes.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with 256‑bit AES, set user and owner passwords, define privileges, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-40.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-rc4-40.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt an existing PDF file with the RC4‑40 algorithm and a user password using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-custom-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Custom Permissions
encrypt-pdf-aes256-custom-permissions.description: Demonstrates how to apply AES‑256 encryption to a PDF while specifying custom user privileges such as printing and content extraction using Aspose.Pdf.

change-user-password-of-encrypted-pdf.title: Change User Password of Encrypted PDF
change-user-password-of-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to update the user password of an already encrypted PDF while keeping the existing encryption settings using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-owner-password-pdf.title: Update Owner Password of a Protected PDF
update-owner-password-pdf.description: Shows how to change the owner password of an encrypted PDF while keeping the existing user password and privileges unchanged using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

change-user-and-owner-passwords.title: Change User and Owner Passwords in PDF
change-user-and-owner-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to update both the user and owner passwords of a PDF file in a single call using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

set-pdf-privileges-allow-print-disallow-.title: Set PDF Privileges to Allow Printing and Disallow Copying
set-pdf-privileges-allow-print-disallow-.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to set document privileges on a PDF, enabling printing while preventing content copying, and saving the protected file.

set-pdf-privileges-allow-form-filling-di.title: Set PDF Privileges: Allow Form Filling, Disable Document Assembly
set-pdf-privileges-allow-form-filling-di.description: Demonstrates how to configure PDF document privileges using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to allow form filling while preventing document assembly operations such as inserting, deleting, or rotating pages.

disable-copying-enable-printing-pdf.title: Enable Printing and Disable Copying in PDF
disable-copying-enable-printing-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to protect a PDF by allowing printing while preventing content extraction (copying) using Aspose.Pdf security features.

remove-usage-rights-from-signed-pdf.title: Remove Usage Rights from Signed PDF
remove-usage-rights-from-signed-pdf.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, detect extended usage rights, remove them, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

check-pdf-extended-usage-rights.title: Check PDF for Extended Usage Rights
check-pdf-extended-usage-rights.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature and determine if it contains extended usage rights using the ContainsUsageRights method.

remove-usage-rights-verify-pdf.title: Remove Usage Rights from PDF and Verify Removal
remove-usage-rights-verify-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, remove its usage rights, verify the removal using ContainsUsageRights, and save the resulting document.

encrypt-pdf-with-exception-handling.title: Encrypt PDF with Exception Handling using PdfFileSecurity
encrypt-pdf-with-exception-handling.description: Demonstrates enabling AllowExceptions on PdfFileSecurity, encrypting a PDF with AES‑256 and Print privilege, and logging detailed exception information via LastException.

set-pdf-privileges-allow-exceptions-fals.title: Set PDF Privileges with Exception Propagation
set-pdf-privileges-allow-exceptions-fals.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF document privileges using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity while disabling internal exception handling so that errors are thrown to the caller.

encrypt-pdf-to-memory-stream.title: Encrypt PDF and Save to MemoryStream
encrypt-pdf-to-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity and write the encrypted document directly to a MemoryStream for network transmission.

encrypt-pdf-from-byte-array.title: Encrypt PDF from Byte Array using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-from-byte-array.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a byte array, encrypt it with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity, and return the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-password-only.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only
encrypt-pdf-with-user-password-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by providing only a user password; the owner password is left undefined so a random one is generated.

apply-password-protection-to-pdf.title: Apply Password Protection to PDF Using PdfFileSecurity
apply-password-protection-to-pdf.description: Shows how to encrypt an existing PDF with user and owner passwords using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity class, without recreating the document object.

get-pdf-encryption-algorithm.title: Get PDF Encryption Algorithm using Aspose.Pdf
get-pdf-encryption-algorithm.description: Demonstrates how to check if a PDF is encrypted and retrieve its current encryption algorithm via the Aspose.Pdf Facades API.

validate-pdf-encryption-and-decrypt.title: Validate PDF Encryption and Decrypt with Owner Password
validate-pdf-encryption-and-decrypt.description: Shows how to check if a PDF is encrypted using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and if so, decrypt it with the owner password; otherwise it simply copies the file.

batch-encrypt-pdf-files.title: Batch Encrypt PDF Files with User and Owner Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdf-files.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity with the same user and owner passwords.

batch-decrypt-pdfs-owner-passwords.title: Batch Decrypt PDFs Using Owner Passwords
batch-decrypt-pdfs-owner-passwords.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON configuration of PDF files and owner passwords, then decrypting each PDF in batch using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

batch-update-pdf-user-passwords.title: Batch Update PDF User Passwords
batch-update-pdf-user-passwords.description: Iterates through a folder of PDF files and applies a standardized user password to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-owner-password-multiple-pdfs.title: Update Owner Password of Multiple PDFs
update-owner-password-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over a list of PDF files, verify each file exists, and change only the owner password using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity while preserving the original user password.

encrypt-pdfs-based-on-filename.title: Encrypt PDFs with Algorithm Selection Based on File Name
encrypt-pdfs-based-on-filename.description: Scans a directory for PDF files, determines the encryption algorithm and key size from each file's name, and encrypts the PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

generate-pdf-encryption-report.title: Generate PDF Encryption Report Using Aspose.Pdf.Facades
generate-pdf-encryption-report.description: Scans a directory of PDF files, uses PdfFileInfo to determine if each file is encrypted, and writes a tab‑delimited report showing the file name, encryption status, and algorithm (or unknown).

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-print-edit-privilege.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑128 and Set Print/Edit Privileges
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-print-edit-privilege.description: Shows how to combine printing and editing privileges and encrypt a PDF using RC4‑128 with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

conditional-decrypt-add-text-pdf.title: Conditional Decrypt and Add Text to PDF
conditional-decrypt-add-text-pdf.description: Shows how to open a PDF, optionally decrypt it with an owner password, insert a text annotation using PdfContentEditor, and save the modified file.

encrypt-pdf-verify-roundtrip.title: Encrypt PDF and Verify Round‑Trip Decryption
encrypt-pdf-verify-roundtrip.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with user/owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf, then decrypt it and confirm that the original and decrypted documents have matching page counts.

encrypt-pdfs-with-performance-timing.title: Encrypt PDFs with Performance Timing
encrypt-pdfs-with-performance-timing.description: Demonstrates encrypting multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity while measuring and logging the time taken for each encryption operation.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-cloud.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Save to Cloud Storage
encrypt-pdf-aes256-cloud.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and write the encrypted file to a cloud storage location.

decrypt-pdf-owner-password.title: Decrypt PDF Using Owner Password with Aspose.Pdf
decrypt-pdf-owner-password.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt an encrypted PDF by supplying the owner password (retrieved from an environment variable as a placeholder for Azure Key Vault) using the Aspose.Pdf Facades API.

folder-watcher-pdf-encryption-service.title: Folder Watcher PDF Encryption Service
folder-watcher-pdf-encryption-service.description: Demonstrates how to monitor a directory for new PDF files, encrypt them with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf, and move the encrypted files to a secure archive.

batch-change-pdf-passwords-from-csv.title: Batch Change PDF User and Owner Passwords from CSV
batch-change-pdf-passwords-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity to change both user and owner passwords for multiple PDF documents in a batch process.

encrypt-pdf-stream-rc4-40.title: Encrypt PDF Stream with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-stream-rc4-40.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF provided as a stream using RC4‑40 encryption with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and return the encrypted content as a new stream.

pdf-encryption-summary-csv.title: Generate PDF Encryption Summary CSV
pdf-encryption-summary-csv.description: Scans a directory of PDF files, determines each file's encryption status and document privileges using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and writes the results to a CSV summary file.

test-decryption-fails-with-incorrect-own.title: Test Decryption Fails with Incorrect Owner Password
test-decryption-fails-with-incorrect-own.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write an NUnit unit test that verifies decryption throws an exception when an invalid owner password is supplied.
